title: MAPPA Regional Annual Reports 2024 to 2025
body: "Multi-Agency Public Protection Arrangements (MAPPA) are a set of arrangements to manage the risk posed by the most serious sexual, violent and terrorist offenders (MAPPA-eligible offenders) under the provisions of sections 325 to 327B of the Criminal Justice Act 2003.  They bring together the Police, Probation and Prison Services in each area into what is known as the MAPPA Responsible Authority.  "
